scripts.start: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start --host lan --port 8083
scripts.dev: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start --host lan --port 8083 --clear
scripts.fresh: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start -c --clear --host lan --port 8083
scripts.phone: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start -c --clear --host lan --port 8083
scripts.dev:lan: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start -c --clear --host lan --port 8083
scripts.tunnel: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start --host tunnel -c --port 8083
scripts.android: node scripts/patch-expo-router-entry.js && node ../shared/block-onedrive.js expo start --android --host lan --port 8083
